member.name: M:AIKernel.Cuda13.Libtorch2_12.WinX64.Interop.SafeLlamaModelHandle.#ctor
member.summary: Executes the #ctor operation as part of the AIKernel public reference surface.

member.name: M:AIKernel.Cuda13.Libtorch2_12.WinX64.Interop.SafeLlamaModelHandle.ToInt32
member.summary: Executes the ToInt32 operation as part of the AIKernel public reference surface.

member.name: M:AIKernel.Cuda13.Libtorch2_12.WinX64.Interop.SafeLlamaModelHandle.ReleaseHandle
member.summary: Releases the native LibTorch model session handle through the stable C ABI and fails closed when the native bridge is unavailable.

member.name: T:AIKernel.Cuda13.Libtorch2_12.WinX64.Interop.SafeLlamaModelHandle
member.summary: Represents the SafeLlamaModelHandle public reference surface for AIKernel package consumers.
